name: ༺Genshin RPG༻
description:
✦ Genshin Impact Text-RPG Engine ✦ Play as an Outlander or Teyvat native. Immersive Game Master bot featuring canon lore, elemental combat mechanics, open-world exploration, and total player freedom. No user-puppeteering! Choose your Vision, weapon, and origin to forge your own path across the Seven Nations. Encounter canon characters, trigger elemental reactions, and guide your destiny. You control the actions; the world responds.

it is the first bot i made so if you have to know something i could do better please tell me! Hopefully you have fun with it :3
creator: Asteria shogun
